name: @doc77/core
description: Doc77 核心引擎 — 数据库、文件系统抽象层、预览引擎、Express Server

scripts.build: tsup && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('src/web','dist/web',{recursive:true})" && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');['index.html','preview.html'].forEach(f=>{const fp=p.join('dist/web',f);if(!fs.existsSync(fp)){console.error('ERROR: '+fp+' missing after build');process.exit(1)}});console.log('Build OK: web assets verified')"
